title: My ports

plan.empty: Add pontoons or anchorages to visualize the plan
plan.hint: Click an empty spot to assign the selected boat.
plan.boatSelected: Selected boat: {name} — click an empty spot to assign it

help.title: How to use the marina plan
help.select: Click an occupied spot to select the boat
help.assign: Click an empty spot to assign the selected boat there
help.deselect: Click on the canvas background to deselect
help.move: In "Edit layout" mode, drag a pontoon or anchorage to reposition it

emptyDescription: Add a port to organize your pontoons and boat berths.
hasBoats: This port has boats assigned. Move them before deleting.

pontoons.title: Pontoons
pontoons.hasBoats: This pontoon has boats assigned. Move them before deleting.

mouillages.title: Anchorages
